words.definition: the methods, procedures, or processes involved in the way something works or is done
words.cn_translation: 机制；事物运行所涉及的方法与流程

words.definition: a situation in which there is no progress or development
words.cn_translation: 停滞；发展停滞不前的状态

words.definition: something not intended or planned that happens as a result of another situation something that you do
words.cn_translation: 副产品；意外衍生出的产物

words.definition: the identifying of the nature or cause of something, especially a problem or fault
words.cn_translation: 诊断；判定问题或故障的根源

words.definition: an object with a fixed position and function
words.cn_translation: 固定装置；位置与功能固定的器件

words.definition: capable of being renewed
words.cn_translation: 可再生的；可以循环再生

words.definition: able to be obtained, used, or experienced without difficulty
words.cn_translation: 易获取的；便于使用的

words.definition: of the greatest importance or the highest rank
words.cn_translation: 首要的；等级最高的

words.definition: a parameter of an engineering design criterion whose value may fluctuate over a wide range
words.cn_translation: 变量；数值可大范围波动的参数

words.definition: an element required for a situation, relationship, or plan
words.cn_translation: 要素；构成计划的必要条件

words.definition: to put something into effect or action
words.cn_translation: 实施；将方案付诸行动

words.definition: to cause something to happen
words.cn_translation: 促使；引发某事发生

words.definition: to base ideas, arguments, or beliefs on something
words.cn_translation: 以……为依据；立论基于事实

words.definition: exactly the same as or equal to something else, or alike in every respect
words.cn_translation: 完全一致的；各方面都一模一样

words.definition: to make something function at its best or most effective, or use something to its best advantage
words.cn_translation: 优化；使效能达到最佳状态

words.definition: the amount of material prepared or needed for, or produced in one operation
words.cn_translation: 批次；单次操作产出的物料量

words.definition: a possible way of achieving something
words.cn_translation: 途径；达成目标的方式

words.definition: one of several parts that together make up a whole machine, system, etc.
words.cn_translation: 组件；构成整体的零部件

words.definition: temporarily simulated or extended by computer software
words.cn_translation: 虚拟的；由软件模拟生成

words.definition: (of a computer program or system) interacting with a human user, often in a conversational way, to obtain data or commands and to give immediate results or updated information
words.cn_translation: 交互式的；人机实时交互

words.definition: a small computer that is easy to carry, with a large touch screen and sometimes without a physical keyboard
words.cn_translation: 平板电脑；大屏触控便携设备

words.definition: done or made so smoothly that you cannot tell where one thing stops and another begins
words.cn_translation: 无缝衔接的；过渡顺滑无断点

words.definition: noting or relating to digital technology or images that actively engage one’s senses and may create an altered mental state
words.cn_translation: 沉浸式的；充分调动感官体验

words.definition: to make something such as a business and an organization work more simply and effectively
words.cn_translation: 精简流程；提升组织运行效率

words.definition: the way in which you see the information from a computer program on a screen, or how you type information into the program
words.cn_translation: 界面；人机信息交互窗口

words.definition: a branch of knowledge
words.cn_translation: 学科；知识门类

words.definition: fixed or incorporated, as into a surrounding mass
words.cn_translation: 嵌入式的；内嵌到主体内部

words.definition: a situation in which you balance two opposing situations or qualities
words.cn_translation: 权衡取舍；利弊平衡

words.definition: together with and at the same time as something else
words.cn_translation: 并行；同步执行

words.definition: something that can be worn that contains computer technology or can connect to the Internet
words.cn_translation: 可穿戴设备；穿戴式智能硬件

words.definition: the practical arrangements that are needed in order to make a plan that involves a lot of people and equipment successful
words.cn_translation: 后勤物流；统筹物资与人员安排

words.definition: able to accept instructions that control how it operates or functions
words.cn_translation: 可编程的；可接收指令修改运行逻辑

words.definition: to happen faster than usual or sooner than you expect
words.cn_translation: 加速；进程提前变快

words.definition: a word with the same meaning as another word in the same language
words.cn_translation: 同义词；语义完全相同的词汇

words.definition: one of the stages of a process of development or change
words.cn_translation: 阶段；发展过程中的一个时期

words.definition: a comparison between things that have similar features, often used to help explain a principle or idea
words.cn_translation: 类比；用相似事物来阐释原理

words.definition: a thing, especially a trend or fact, that indicates the state or level of something
words.cn_translation: 指标；反映现状的风向标

words.definition: to destroy somebody or something completely
words.cn_translation: 彻底消灭；完全摧毁

words.definition: relating to the part of philosophy that is about understanding existence and knowledge
words.cn_translation: 形而上学的；研究存在与认知的哲学范畴

words.definition: the fact of being responsible for what you do and able to give a satisfactory reason for it
words.cn_translation: 问责制；为自身行为承担责任

words.definition: the process of changing from analog to digital form
words.cn_translation: 数字化；从模拟信号转为数字信号

words.definition: having the ability to work and make decisions by yourself without any help from anyone else
words.cn_translation: 自主的；独立决策运行

words.definition: to refuse to consider someone or something seriously because you think they are not important
words.cn_translation: 不予理会；轻视而不加以考量

words.definition: causing problems, noise, etc. so that something cannot continue normally
words.cn_translation: 具有破坏性的；扰乱正常秩序

words.definition: to get used to a new situation
words.cn_translation: 适应；顺应新环境

words.definition: to change something slightly, usually in order to improve it
words.cn_translation: 微调修改；小幅改动优化

words.definition: the money that is available to a person or an organization and a plan of how it will be spent over a period of time
words.cn_translation: 预算；资金额度与开支规划

words.definition: to improve the aptitude for work of (a person) by additional training
words.cn_translation: 技能提升；通过培训增强职业能力

words.definition: to deal with
words.cn_translation: 处理；应对问题

words.definition: to come into use or service
words.cn_translation: 上线；投入运行使用

words.definition: the ability to return to its original state after being disturbed
words.cn_translation: 韧性；受干扰后恢复原状的能力

words.definition: a service provided for the public, for example, an electricity, water or gas supply
words.cn_translation: 公用事业；水电燃气等公共服务

words.definition: happening over a very wide area or involving a lot of people or things
words.cn_translation: 大规模的；覆盖范围广、参与人数多

words.definition: to continue after an interruption
words.cn_translation: 恢复；中断之后继续开展

words.definition: to make good use of
words.cn_translation: 充分利用；用好有利条件

words.definition: a thing that is made up of many different pieces or parts
words.cn_translation: 拼凑物；由零散部件拼接而成
